design_philosophy: Elegant, tactile, and editorial. Evokes the physical touch of premium cotton paper and wax seals. It uses high-contrast serif typography paired with clean sans-serif for modern readability. The animation should feel deliberate and physics-based.

headings.h1: font-serif text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter text-stone-900 leading-none
headings.subtitle: font-sans uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-500

envelope_animation.structure: A centered container holding '.envelope-wrapper'. Inside: '.envelope-back', '.letter' (with dynamic guest name), '.envelope-front' (borders CSS trick or SVG), '.envelope-flap' (top triangle), and '.wax-seal'.

css_rules.envelope_container: relative w-[300px] sm:w-[400px] h-[200px] sm:h-[250px] mx-auto perspective-1000
css_rules.envelope_flap: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[60%] bg-[#E5E5E0] origin-top transition-transform duration-700 ease-in-out z-40 border-b border-stone-300
css_rules.letter: absolute bottom-0 w-[90%] left-[5%] h-full bg-white transition-all duration-1000 delay-500 ease-out z-20 shadow-md p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center
css_rules.wax_seal: absolute bottom-[-20px] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-12 h-12 bg-[#8B1C31] rounded-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center text-white font-serif text-xl

envelope_animation.orchestration: 1. User clicks envelope (wax seal). 2. Wax seal fades out/breaks. 3. Flap rotates 180deg (opens). 4. Letter slides up and out. 5. Wait 1 second, then fade out the envelope container and smoothly route/transition to the main invite page.

timeline.style: Vertical line down the center. Alternating content blocks. Use generous padding (p-8) inside minimalist soft-rounded (rounded-sm) cards with subtle ambient shadows or pure 1px borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B1C31] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#6b1425] transition-colors font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-sm inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: border border-stone-300 bg-transparent text-stone-800 px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-sm inline-flex items-center justify-center

hero_background.description: Romantic outdoor wedding ceremony with vintage light effects, used for the main hero section.

paper_texture.description: Cream textured background. Apply as a fixed background with mix-blend-multiply and low opacity (10-20%) to give the entire page a tactile paper feel.

wax_seal_reference.description: Reference for styling the CSS wax seal.

venue_gallery_1.description: Elegant wedding reception tables with floral decorations.

venue_gallery_2.description: Beautifully decorated wedding venue with vibrant floral arrangements.

couple_gallery_1.description: Black and white photo of bride and groom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' via Google Fonts in index.html. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
Extend Tailwind configuration with the custom colors provided: background, surface, text_primary, accent_primary (#8B1C31), accent_secondary (#4A5D23).
Implement the landing page at /invite/:guestSlug. Read the guestSlug param and display it dynamically as 'To: [Guest Name]' on the envelope exterior and 'Dearest [Guest Name]' on the letter inside.

Build the envelope using pure CSS and Tailwind. Follow the 'envelope_animation' rules in this JSON. Ensure physics-based stagger: 1. Click seal 2. Flap rotates 3. Letter slides up 4. Transition to main invite.

For the main invite, implement these vertical sections: Hero (large names, date, background image), Our Story (timeline), Event Schedule (Ceremony + Reception details), Venue info, Photo Gallery (bento grid layout), Countdown timer.
Ensure layout breathes. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Embrace negative space.

On the /guests route, build an admin tool. Display a list of guests using Shadcn Table or List components. Include a form to add a new guest name (which generates a slug), and a button to copy their personalized /invite/:guestSlug URL.
Include 'lucide-react' icons for UI elements, but keep them minimal.
Apply all 'data-testid' attributes to interactive elements to ensure automated testing succeeds.
